flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clemson University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Clemson University are 50% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($71.5k vs $47.7k).
